title: Forcepoint Remote Browser Isolation Session Audit (`forcepoint:one`)
dataSources: Forcepoint cloud SSE (`forcepoint:one`), on-prem Web Security (`websense:cg:kv`), Email (`forcepoint:email:kv`), DLP (`forcepoint:dlp`)
app: Forcepoint Insights SIEM App (Splunkbase 8053); Forcepoint Web Security TA (`websense:cg:kv`); Email Security KV (`forcepoint:email:kv`)
spl:
index=sase sourcetype="forcepoint:one" earliest=-24h
| where match(lower(event_type),"(?i)isolation|rbi|remote browser")
| stats count by user, url_host, action
| sort -count
description: Isolation contains risky clicks; auditing sessions proves the control ran for regulated user populations.
value: Demonstrates compensating controls for PCI and ISO browser-security objectives.
implementation: Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

references.title: Splunk Add-on for Forcepoint Web Security

grandmaExplanation: We pull together Forcepoint security logs so risky web, email, and data-loss patterns are visible in one place.
